violations.text: Prep unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Product in this unit observed with temperatures of 43 - 44 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Large amount of dust observed on the evaporator coil. Employee vacuumed the unit during inspection. Ambient temperature observed at 39 degrees F at the end of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
2-door reach-in located in the storage room is not in good repair and is not currently being used. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025

Door gaskets of the 2-door reach-in and the first chest freezer (in storage room) were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, the ventilation fans of the 2-door reach-in, and gaskets of the prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, black residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
